name: Exosome / Extracellular Vesicle Isolation (Differential Ultracentrifugation)
nameCn: 外泌体/胞外囊泡分离（差速超速离心法）

components.name: 1. Culture cells in EV-depleted medium (48–72 h conditioned medium)

note.en: EV-free FBS: ultracentrifuge commercial FBS at 100,000×g 18 h 4°C; collect supernatant. Or use serum-free medium for last 24–48 h (lower contamination, lower yield). Volume: ≥50 mL conditioned medium needed.
note.zh: 去 EV 血清：商业 FBS 100,000×g 4°C 18 h 超速离心；取上清。或最后 24–48 h 改无血清培养基（污染少，产量低）。需 ≥50 mL 条件培养基。
沉淀 = 凋亡小体（弃去）。保留上清。

note.en: Pellet = large microvesicles/MVBs (200–1,000 nm). Can collect separately. Keep supernatant for exosome isolation.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 大型微囊泡/MVB（200–1,000 nm，可单独收集）。保留上清用于外泌体分离。

note.en: Removes residual large particles. PES membrane (low protein binding). Keep filtrate.
note.zh: 去除残余大颗粒。用低蛋白结合 PES 膜。保留滤液。

components.name: 6. Exosome pellet: 100,000×g, 70–90 min, 4°C (Ti-45 or SW-41 Ti rotor)

note.en: First 100k spin pellets exosomes (30–200 nm). Discard supernatant (cytosol + soluble proteins).
note.zh: 第一次 100k 离心沉淀外泌体（30–200 nm）。弃去上清（细胞质 + 可溶蛋白）。

components.name: 7. Wash: resuspend pellet in 10 mL cold PBS; 100,000×g, 70 min, 4°C

note.en: Removes contaminating soluble proteins. Repeat once more for higher purity.
note.zh: 去除污染的可溶蛋白。再重复一次可提高纯度。

components.name: 8. Resuspend final pellet in PBS or appropriate buffer (50–200 µL)

note.en: Pipette gently. Do not vortex. Store at −80°C (single-use aliquots) or use fresh. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw.
note.zh: 轻柔吸打重悬。不涡旋。−80°C 单次分装保存或新鲜使用。避免反复冻融。

note.en: MISEV2018 guidelines (Théry 2018): report at least 3 markers. NTA (NanoSight, ZetaView): size 50–200 nm, report concentration/mL. TEM: cup-shaped morphology. Negative markers: GM130 (no Golgi contamination), Cytochrome C (no mitochondria).
note.zh: MISEV2018 指南（Théry 2018）：至少报告 3 个标记。NTA（NanoSight、ZetaView）：尺寸 50–200 nm，报告浓度/mL。透射电镜：杯形形态。阴性标记：GM130（无 Golgi 污染）、细胞色素 c（无线粒体）。

notes.en: This protocol yields crude exosome preparation. For higher purity: further fractionate on iodixanol (OptiPrep) density gradient (top-loading, 40,000×g 18 h). Typical yield: 10⁹–10¹⁰ particles/mL from 50 mL conditioned medium. Alternative methods: SEC (size exclusion on qEV columns), precipitation (ExoQuick, fast but impure), immunoaffinity (anti-CD63 beads). All reported per MISEV2018 guidelines.
notes.zh: 本方案获得粗制外泌体制品。更高纯度：碘克沙醇（OptiPrep）密度梯度进一步分离（顶部上样，40,000×g 18 h）。典型产量：50 mL 条件培养基 → 10⁹–10¹⁰ 颗粒/mL。替代方法：SEC（qEV 柱分子排阻）、沉淀法（ExoQuick，快速但不纯）、免疫亲和法（anti-CD63 磁珠）。所有报告遵循 MISEV2018 指南。

ref: Théry et al. (2006) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.22.1; Théry et al. (2018) J Extracell Vesicles 7:1535750 (MISEV2018); Witwer et al. (2021) J Extracell Vesicles 10:e12080

materials.name: Conditioned cell culture medium (48–72 h, serum-free or exosome-depleted FBS)

usage.en: Isolate exosomes/small extracellular vesicles from cell culture medium by differential ultracentrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速超离法从细胞培养液中分离外泌体/小细胞外囊泡。

note.en: Conditioned medium can be stored at −80°C for up to 3 months before processing
note.zh: 条件培养基可 −80°C 保存 3 个月后再处理

note.en: Filtered supernatant (post 0.22 µm) can be stored at 4°C overnight before ultracentrifugation
note.zh: 过滤后上清（0.22 µm 后）可 4°C 过夜保存再超离

note.en: Resuspended exosome pellet can be stored at −80°C in single-use aliquots for 1 month
note.zh: 重悬的外泌体沉淀可 −80°C 单次分装保存 1 个月

detailedSteps.en: Culture cells in exosome-depleted FBS medium (or serum-free for last 24–48 h). Collect 48–72 h conditioned medium (≥50 mL needed)
detailedSteps.zh: 在去外泌体 FBS 培养基中培养细胞（或最后 24–48 h 改无血清）。收集 48–72 h 条件培养基（需 ≥50 mL）

detailedSteps.en: Remove live cells: 300×g, 10 min, 4°C. Transfer supernatant to new tube
detailedSteps.zh: 去除活细胞：300×g 离心 10 min，4°C。转移上清至新管

detailedSteps.en: Remove dead cells/apoptotic bodies: 2,000×g, 10 min, 4°C. Discard pellet, keep supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 去除死细胞/凋亡小体：2,000×g 离心 10 min，4°C。弃沉淀，保留上清

detailedSteps.en: Remove large microvesicles: 10,000×g, 30 min, 4°C. Pellet = large MVs (200–1,000 nm, collect separately if needed). Keep supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 去除大型微囊泡：10,000×g 离心 30 min，4°C。沉淀 = 大 MV（200–1,000 nm，需要时可单独收集）。保留上清

detailedSteps.en: Filter supernatant through 0.22 µm PES membrane (low protein binding) to remove residual large particles
detailedSteps.zh: 将上清过 0.22 µm PES 膜（低蛋白结合）去除残余大颗粒

detailedSteps.en: Ultracentrifuge at 100,000×g, 70–90 min, 4°C (Ti-45 or SW-41 Ti rotor). Discard supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 100,000×g 超速离心 70–90 min，4°C（Ti-45 或 SW-41 Ti 转头）。弃上清

detailedSteps.en: Wash pellet: resuspend in 10 mL cold PBS, ultracentrifuge again at 100,000×g, 70 min, 4°C. Repeat once for higher purity
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤沉淀：用 10 mL 冷 PBS 重悬，再次 100,000×g 离心 70 min，4°C。重复一次以提高纯度

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend final exosome pellet in 50–200 µL PBS (pipette gently, do not vortex). Store at −80°C in single-use aliquots
detailedSteps.zh: 用 50–200 µL PBS 轻柔重悬最终外泌体沉淀（勿涡旋）。−80°C 单次分装保存

detailedSteps.en: NTA (NanoSight/ZetaView): confirm size 50–200 nm, report concentration/mL. TEM: verify cup-shaped morphology. Western blot: positive markers CD63/CD9/CD81/Alix; negative markers GM130 (Golgi), Cytochrome C (mito)
detailedSteps.zh: NTA（NanoSight/ZetaView）：确认尺寸 50–200 nm，报告浓度/mL。TEM：验证杯形形态。Western blot：阳性标记 CD63/CD9/CD81/Alix；阴性标记 GM130（Golgi）、细胞色素 c（线粒体）

briefSteps.en: Collect conditioned medium → 300×g remove cells → 2,000×g remove debris → 10,000×g remove large MVs → 0.22 µm filter → 100,000×g pellet exosomes → PBS wash 100,000×g → resuspend → characterize (NTA/TEM/WB)
briefSteps.zh: 收集条件培养基 → 300×g 去细胞 → 2,000×g 去碎片 → 10,000×g 去大 MV → 0.22 µm 过滤 → 100,000×g 沉淀外泌体 → PBS 洗 100,000×g → 重悬 → 表征（NTA/TEM/WB）
